questions.title: Hazrat Bibi Fatima (RA) was the daughter of Hazrat Muhammad (PBUH) and ________?
questions.explanation:
Hazrat Bibi Fatima is 4th daughter and 5th child of Hazrat Muhammad and Hazrat Khadija (RA)

She was born in Makkah on the 20th of Jumada al-Thaniya 18 B.H.

She married Hazrat Ali RA ( 4th Rashidun Caliphs) in 2 AH

She had 2 sons and 2 daughters: 

  1. Imam Hussain
  2. Imam Hassan
  3. Zaynab 
  4. Umm Kulthum

Title of Bibi Fatima is: Tahira, Zahra, Umm Abiha, Sayyidatu nisa-alamin and al-Batul

She died in Madina on 11/632 

She was buried in Jannat-ul-Baqi


Additional Information:

Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.
1. Hazrat Qasim 
2. Hazrat Zainab (RA)
3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) 
4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) 
5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) 
6. Hazrat Abdullah
7. Hazrat Ibrahim

Know everything about Hazrat Usman (R.A)

Hazrat Usman (RA) at the persuasion of Hazrat Abu-Bakr (RA) accepted Islam.

Wives of Hazrat Usman (RA) namely Ruqayyah (RA) & Umm-e-Kulthum (RA) were the daughter of the Holy Prophet (PBUH).

Hazrat Usman (RA) could not participate in Battle of Badr because his wife Ruqayyah (RA) was on deathbed.

Ruqayyah (RA died on victory day of Battle of Badr.

Hazrat Usman (RA) purchased the adjoining land for 25,000 dirham to extend Masjid-e-Nabavi.

Hazrat Usman used to enfranchise a slave on every Friday.

Muslim Navy was also developed during the period of Hazrat Usman (RA).

 Zun-Noorain means Possessor of Two Lights

Jame-al-Quran means compiler of Quran.

questions.explanation: Uthman, also spelled Osman, was the third Rashidun caliph, ruling from November 644 until his assassination.

questions.title: Who adopted the title of Ameer-ul-Momineen for the first time?
questions.explanation:
Hazrat Umar (RA)  adopted the title of Ameer-ul-Momineen for the first time.

On his accession in 634, Umar ibn Khattab, the Second Rashidun Caliph, was given the title.

According to At-Tabaqat al Kubra, When Abu Bakr died, Muslims of the time said: “We are the Mu'minin and Umar is our Amir (Commander).”

After this, the title Amir al-Mu'minin was held by Umar ibn Khattab who was also the first one to be given this title.

questions.title: The name of lbn-e- Hisham's famous book is:
questions.explanation:
Al-Sirah al-Nabawiyyah

  • As-Sīrah an-Nabawiyyah (السيرة النبوية), 'The Life of the Prophet'; is an edited recension of Ibn Isḥāq's classic Sīratu Rasūli l-Lāh (سيرة رسول الله) 'The Life of God's Messenger'.
  • Ibn Isḥāq's now lost work survives only in Ibn Hishām's and al-Tabari's recensions, although fragments of several others survive, and Ibn Hishām and al-Tabarī share virtually the same material.

questions.title: Hazrat ___had knowledge of dreams
questions.explanation:
Hazrat Abu Bakar (R.A) had the knowledge of dreams. and Prophets Hazrat Yusuf (R.A) was an expert in the knowledge of dreams

  • Abu Bakr (R.A) was the first Caliph of Islam.
  • He was also Muhammad's father-in-law and father of Hazrat Aisha.
  • His real name was Abdullah or Abul-Kaaba, and Abu Bakr was his kunya.

Qusay in Islam
Qusayy ibn Kilab ibn Murra (Arabic: قصي ٱبن كلاب ٱبن مرة, romanized:

questions.title: How is the fourth daughter of our Holy prophet ﷺ?
questions.explanation:
Hazrat Bibi Fatima is 4th daughter and 5th child of Hazrat Muhammad and Hazrat Khadija (RA)

She was born in Makkah on the 20th of Jumada al-Thaniya 18 B.H.

Title of Bibi Fatima is: Tahira, Zahra, Umm Abiha, Sayyidatu nisa-alamin and al-Batul

She died in Madina on 11/632 

She was buried in Jannat-ul-Baqi

Hazrat Bibi Fatima married Hazrat Ali RA ( 4th Rashidun Caliphs) in 2 AH

She had 2 sons and 2 daughters: 

  1. Imam Hussain
  2. Imam Hassan
  3. Zaynab 
  4. Umm Kulthum


Additional Information:

Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.
1. Hazrat Qasim 
2. Hazrat Zainab (RA)
3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) 
4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) 
5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) 
6. Hazrat Abdullah
7. Hazrat Ibrahim

questions.title: The word Islam occurs ___times in Holy Quran is:
questions.explanation:
1. How many time Besmillah Al-Rahmaan Al-Raheem is repeated? 114.
  2. How many Sura start with Besmillah Al-Rahmaan Al-Raheem? 113.
  3. How many time the word 'Quran' is repeated in Holy Quran ? 70.
  4. Which is the longest Sura of Holy Quran ? Al-Baqarah.
  5. Which is the best drink mentioned in Holy Quran ? Milk.
  6. The best eatable thing mentioned in Holy Quran is ? Honey.Which is the shortest Sura of Holy Quran ? Qausar

*******

The word “Islam” is used 10 times in Quran. Here are 9 verses of the Quran that mention “Islam”:

  • Quran (2:208) : يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ادْخُلُوا فِي السِّلْمِ كَافَّةً وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا خُطُوَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ ۚ إِنَّهُ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ, 
  • Quran (5:3) : الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ وَأَتْمَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ نِعْمَتِي وَرَضِيتُ لَكُمُ الْإِسْلَامَ دِينًا ۚ , 
  • Quran (3:19) : إِنَّ الدِّينَ عِندَ اللَّهِ الْإِسْلَامُ ۗ, 
  • Quran (3:85) : وَمَن يَبْتَغِ غَيْرَ الْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا فَلَن يُقْبَلَ مِنْهُ وَهُوَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ,  
  • Quran (6:125) : فَمَن يُرِدِ اللَّهُ أَن يَهْدِيَهُ يَشْرَحْ صَدْرَهُ لِلْإِسْلَامِ, 
  • Quran (9:74) : يَحْلِفُونَ بِاللَّهِ مَا قَالُوا وَلَقَدْ قَالُوا كَلِمَةَ الْكُفْرِ وَكَفَرُوا بَعْدَ إِسْلَامِهِمْ وَهَمُّوا بِمَا لَمْ يَنَالُوا, 
  • Quran (39:22) : أَفَمَن شَرَحَ اللَّهُ صَدْرَهُ لِلْإِسْلَامِ فَهُوَ عَلَىٰ نُورٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِ ۚ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْقَاسِيَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مِّن ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ ۚ أُولَٰئِكَ فِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ, 
  • Quran (49:17) : يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيْكَ أَنْ أَسْلَمُوا ۖ قُل لَّا تَمُنُّوا عَلَيَّ إِسْلَامَكُم ۖ بَلِ اللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنْ هَدَاكُمْ لِلْإِيمَانِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ ,
  • Quran (61:7) : وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ افْتَرَىٰ عَلَى اللَّهِ الْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰ إِلَى الْإِسْلَامِ ۚ وَاللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ ,

questions.title: Who was the youngest son of Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ?
questions.explanation:
Ibrahim was the third (youngest) son of Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ and Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).

Ibrahim ibn Muhammad Born in Dhu al-Hijjah 8 AH 
He has died at the age of 2 on Shawwal 29, 10 AH

He was buried in Jannat al-Baqi, Medina



Additional Information:

Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

1. Hazrat Qasim 
2. Hazrat Zainab (RA)
3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) 
4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) 
5. Hazrat Fatima (RA)

questions.title: The historic city of Kairouan in Tunisia was founded in 678 AD by
questions.explanation:
The historic city of Kairouan in Tunisia was founded in 670 AD by Uqba ibn Nafi,

He is an Arab general and companion of the Prophet Muhammad

The name "Kairouan" comes from a Persian word that means "a camp". 

It was the first Islamic capital in the Maghreb. 

The Great Mosque of Kairouan was built when the city was founded. 


Kairouan is located in north-central Tunisia, on the Basse Steppe (Low Steppes).

It is a holy city of Islam and a UNESCO World Heritage Site

questions.title: Who was the founder and first caliph of the Umayyad Caliphate?

 He became caliph less than thirty years after the death of the Islamic prophet Muhammad

He was appointed as the Governor of Syria after his brother, Yazid ibn Abu Sufyan, died

Ameer Muawiyah (R.A) established the Postal System

questions.explanation:
